# EPIC-STATUS Template

## Overview

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Epic** | EPIC-{NUMBER} |
| **Title** | {Short title} |
| **Status** | open / in-progress / done / blocked |
| **Branch** | `epic/EPIC-{NUMBER}` |
| **Created** | {YYYY-MM-DD} |

## Goal

{What the system can DO when this epic is fully complete — 2–4 sentences.}

## Acceptance Criteria (Epic-Level)

- [ ] AC1: {End-to-end verifiable criterion}
- [ ] AC2: ...

| Ticket | Title | Status | Contribution |
